steps: Chop tomato and onion.|Heat oil in a pan.|Saute onion and garlic.|Add tomato and cook until soft.|Season and simmer for 5 minutes.
Boil or parboil potatoes.|Heat oil in a pan.|Add garlic and potato.|Season with salt and pepper.|Roast until golden.
Slice all vegetables evenly.|Heat a pan or wok.|Add garlic and onion first.|Add remaining vegetables and stir fry.|Finish with soy sauce.
